category_sources: Official Apache Flume user guide describes collecting, aggregating, and moving large amounts of log data.
source_facts.description says it is Hadoop-based distributed log collection and aggregation.
display_name_sources: Official Apache Flume site and documentation use Apache Flume.
docs_sources: Official Flume User Guide documents Flume 1.11.0 usage.
Official flume.apache.org documentation page links released user and developer guides.
repo_sources: Official Apache Flume Source Repository page lists https://github.com/apache/flume as the online source repository and git clone URL.
tags_sources: Official Apache Flume user guide describes distributed, reliable log data collection and movement.
source_facts.description identifies Hadoop-based distributed log collection and aggregation.
